url-encode.whatItIs: The URL Encode tool converts special characters in URLs to their percent-encoded format. Essential for web developers and API users who need to include spaces, symbols, and non-ASCII characters in valid web addresses.
features: Encode URLs for safe web use
Support for special characters and spaces
Copy encoded URLs with one click

howToUse.name: How to Use the URL Encode Tool

steps.name: Enter your URL or text
steps.text: Type or paste the URL or text containing special characters that need encoding. You can also encode just query parameters.

steps.name: Encode the content
steps.text: Click the encode button. The tool converts special characters to their percent-encoded equivalents (e.g., spaces become %20).

steps.name: View the encoded result
steps.text: See the encoded URL with a comparison to the original. Non-ASCII characters are properly encoded for web use.

steps.name: Copy and use
steps.text: Copy the encoded URL to your clipboard. Use it in links, API requests, or HTML forms where special characters would cause issues.

faqs.question: When do I need to URL encode?
faqs.answer: URL encoding is needed when including special characters like spaces, ampersands, question marks, or non-ASCII characters in URLs. This ensures the URL is valid and safe to use.

faqs.question: What characters get encoded?
faqs.answer: Characters like space, !, #, $, %, &, *, and non-ASCII characters are converted to percent-encoded format. Alphanumeric characters and -_.~ remain unencoded.

faqs.question: Can I encode just query parameters?
faqs.answer: Yes, the tool can encode just the query string portion of a URL, which is useful when building API requests with multiple parameters.

faqs.question: Is URL encoding free?
faqs.answer: Yes, URL encoding is completely free with unlimited usage.

url-encode.seoDescription: URL encode text and special characters online for free. Convert URLs to percent-encoded format for safe web use. Batch encoding supported.

url-decode.whatItIs: The URL Decode tool converts percent-encoded URLs back to their readable, original format. Decode encoded URLs, query strings, and URI components to understand what they link to or extract original data.
features: Copy decoded URLs with one click

howToUse.name: How to Use the URL Decode Tool

steps.name: Paste encoded URL
steps.text: Copy and paste the percent-encoded URL or query string you want to decode. The tool handles all standard encoding formats.

steps.name: Decode the URL
steps.text: Click the decode button. The tool converts all percent-encoded sequences back to their original characters.

steps.name: View the readable URL
steps.text: See the decoded URL in its original, readable form. Spaces, special characters, and Unicode characters are restored.

steps.name: Copy the decoded URL
steps.text: Click to copy the decoded URL. Use it to understand where a link goes or to extract original data from encoded strings.

faqs.question: Why would I need to decode a URL?
faqs.answer: URL decoding is useful when you receive encoded URLs from emails, logs, or API responses and need to understand the actual destination or extract the original data.

faqs.question: Does it handle double-encoded URLs?
faqs.answer: The tool decodes standard percent-encoded URLs. For double-encoded URLs, run the decode operation twice or use the batch decode feature.

faqs.question: Can I decode query parameters separately?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can paste just the query string portion to decode individual parameters without affecting the base URL.

faqs.question: Is URL decoding free?
faqs.answer: Yes, decoding URLs is completely free with unlimited usage.

url-decode.seoDescription: Decode URL encoded strings online for free. Convert percent-encoded URLs back to readable format. Batch decode query parameters and URIs.

password-generator.whatItIs: The Password Generator creates strong, secure passwords with customizable length, character types, and complexity. Generate passwords that meet website requirements for uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Password Generator

steps.name: Set password options
steps.text: Choose the password length and select which character types to include: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols. Adjust options to meet site requirements.

steps.name: Generate passwords
steps.text: Click generate to create one or more random passwords. The tool uses cryptographically secure random generation where available.

steps.name: Check strength
steps.text: Review the password strength indicator showing entropy and estimated crack time. Stronger passwords have higher entropy scores.

steps.name: Copy and use
steps.text: Click to copy your chosen password. Store it securely in a password manager for safekeeping.

faqs.question: How long should my password be?
faqs.answer: Use at least 12 characters for important accounts. Longer passwords (16+ characters) are significantly more secure. The tool supports up to 128 characters.

faqs.question: Are generated passwords truly random?
faqs.answer: The tool uses cryptographically secure random number generation where supported by your browser, ensuring passwords are unpredictable and unique.

faqs.question: Can I generate passwords without symbols?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can customize which character types to include. Some websites restrict special characters, so you can generate compatible passwords.

faqs.question: Is the Password Generator free?
faqs.answer: Yes, generating secure passwords is completely free with unlimited usage.

password-generator.seoDescription: Generate strong secure passwords online for free. Create random passwords with custom length and character types. Password strength checker included.

word-counter.whatItIs: The Word Counter counts words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text instantly. Shows reading time, keyword density, and character statistics for writers, students, and content creators optimizing their content.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Word Counter

steps.name: Paste or type your text
steps.text: Copy and paste your text into the input area or type directly. The counter updates in real-time as you type or paste.

steps.name: View statistics
steps.text: See word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count, and estimated reading time displayed prominently.

steps.name: Analyze keywords
steps.text: Check keyword density and frequency. The tool shows which words appear most often and their percentage of total words.

steps.name: Use the results
steps.text: Use the statistics for content planning, meeting word count requirements, or optimizing your writing for readability.

faqs.question: Does it count words in different languages?
faqs.answer: Yes, the word counter supports multiple languages including English, Hindi, Spanish, French, and more. Word boundaries are detected appropriately for each language.

faqs.question: What is reading time based on?
faqs.answer: Reading time is estimated based on average reading speed of 200-250 words per minute for adults. The tool shows both silent reading and aloud reading estimates.

faqs.question: Does it count spaces and punctuation?
faqs.answer: The tool shows both character count with spaces and without spaces, plus separate counts for letters, numbers, and punctuation.

faqs.question: Is the Word Counter free?
faqs.answer: Yes, all word counting features are completely free with unlimited usage.

word-counter.seoDescription: Count words and characters online for free. Real-time word counter with reading time and keyword density analysis. Essential for writers and content creators.
